productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Calcetto Black Red Shoe
description: Value for money, the lotto Stadio firm ground football boot is a great footwear for beginners. Replete with water repellent and impact protection features, the Stadio allows your feet to flex perfectly, offering great elastic return of energy.Upper Water-repellent premium plus upper to keep your boots in the best shape Mesh lining on the collar and below the synthetic tongue for durability Knitted lace for extended durability and snug Fit Cushioned collar and padded tongue for added comfort and snug fit Glossy synthetic panel outside the heel cup with branding for style Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight comfort and enhanced shock absorption Outsole Rearfoot shock-off feature to cushion the foot during a hard round of hard ground football Mult-directional pattern on the outsole for excellent grip and traction Pivot point on big toe mound for flexible 180 degree movement of the forefoot shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
